org.apache.paimon.table.sink

Class CommitMessageSerializer

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.table.sink.CommitMessageSerializer
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    VersionedSerializer<CommitMessage>

    public class CommitMessageSerializer
extends Object
implements VersionedSerializer<CommitMessage>
    VersionedSerializer for CommitMessage.

      • getVersion

        public int getVersion()
        Description copied from interface: VersionedSerializer
        Gets the version with which this serializer serializes.
        Specified by:
        getVersion in interface VersionedSerializer<CommitMessage>
        Returns:
        The version of the serialization schema.

      • serialize

        public byte[] serialize(CommitMessage obj)
                 throws IOException
        Description copied from interface: VersionedSerializer
        Serializes the given object. The serialization is assumed to correspond to the current serialization version (as returned by VersionedSerializer.getVersion().
        Specified by:
        serialize in interface VersionedSerializer<CommitMessage>
        Parameters:
        obj - The object to serialize.
        Returns:
        The serialized data (bytes).
        Throws:
        IOException - Thrown, if the serialization fails.

                   throws IOException
        Throws:

      • deserialize

        public CommitMessage deserialize(int version,
                                 byte[] serialized)
                          throws IOException
        Description copied from interface: VersionedSerializer
        De-serializes the given data (bytes) which was serialized with the scheme of the indicated version.
        Specified by:
        deserialize in interface VersionedSerializer<CommitMessage>
        Parameters:
        version - The version in which the data was serialized
        serialized - The serialized data
        Returns:
        The deserialized object
        Throws:
        IOException - Thrown, if the deserialization fails.

      • deserializeList

        public List<CommitMessage> deserializeList(int version,
                                           DataInputView view)
                                    throws IOException
        Throws:
